# fly_tigris_bucket (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io Tigris storage bucket. Import using the bucket name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_tigris_bucket" "example" {
  name   = "my-storage-bucket"
  org    = "personal"
  public = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the bucket. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `org` (String) The organization slug. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `custom_domain` (String) Custom domain for the bucket.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether the bucket is publicly accessible.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the bucket.
- `status` (String) The bucket status.
